name: away_natvent_exits_at_comfort_ceiling
description: Nat-vent while away uses free cooling until indoor reaches comfort_cool (74F), then should exit and let HVAC setback handle it. The ceiling exit while away requires Issue #231 production fix to add a comfort_cool exit gate in check_natural_vent_conditions() for away occupancy.
notes: Correct production behavior: nat-vent activates while home, continues after away transition (setpoint-only change).
While away with nat-vent active, free cooling keeps indoor below setback_cool=79F.
At 14:00 when indoor reaches comfort_cool=74F ceiling, nat-vent should exit â€” further cooling via open windows
risks dropping below comfort_heat and accumulating violations.
The 14:00 nat_vent_not_active assertion documents the Issue #231 fix behavior.
In simulator: _check_natural_vent_exit() checks comfort_heat floor (74 > 70, no exit), outdoor >= indoor
(68 < 74, no exit), and outdoor > threshold (68 < 77, no exit) â€” nat-vent stays active (documents gap).
Mark the 14:00 exit assertion simulator_support=false until Issue #231 fix is ported to simulate.py.
The 09:01 activation, 10:00 setback, and 10:00 nat_vent_still_active assertions are all simulator_support=true.

verdict.summary: Nat-vent uses free cooling while away, exits at comfort_cool ceiling (74F) rather than cooling below comfort band
verdict.observed_behavior: nat-vent activates while home, persists through away transition (setback applied), exits when indoor reaches comfort_cool
verdict.expected_behavior: Free cooling opportunity exploited while away; ceiling exit at comfort_cool prevents over-cooling and accumulating comfort violations in the band

events.note: Warm-day classification: HVAC in cool mode
Morning: indoor 72F within band [70F, 74F], outdoor 65F â€” nat-vent favorable
Window opens: outdoor 65F < indoor 72F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F, outdoor < threshold 77F â€” nat-vent activates
User leaves. Production: only setpoint changes to setback_cool=79F. Nat-vent continues running.

Afternoon: indoor has risen to 74F (comfort_cool ceiling). Outdoor 68F still cooler than indoor. In production (Issue #231 fix): nat-vent exits at comfort_cool ceiling to prevent further warming risk. In simulator: no exit condition fires â€” nat-vent stays active (documents simulator gap).

assertions.reason: sensor_open: outdoor 65F < indoor 72F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F, outdoor 65F <= threshold 77F â€” nat-vent activates while occupancy is home
Away transition: setback_cool=79F applied. This is the only change production makes on occupancy_away â€” nat-vent is not exited.

After away transition, nat-vent state flag must still be True. Production handle_occupancy_away() only changes the setpoint â€” it does not exit nat-vent. Checks SimState.natural_vent_active directly.

Issue #231 fix: when indoor reaches comfort_cool=74F ceiling while away and nat-vent is active, nat-vent should exit. Free cooling has done its job; further outdoor air could stall at the ceiling or risk over-cooling. Production check_natural_vent_conditions() needs a comfort_cool exit gate for away occupancy. Simulator gap: _check_natural_vent_exit() only checks comfort_heat floor (74 > 70, no exit), outdoor >= indoor (68 < 74, no exit), and outdoor > threshold (68 < 77, no exit) â€” nat-vent stays active until Issue #231 fix is ported to simulate.py.
assertions.note: Requires Issue #231 production fix AND a corresponding simulate.py update before this assertion can be promoted to simulator_support=true.
